summary: Full backend + frontend test of Advance Connect lead-gen homepage. All 5 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend flows work: hero, 3D canvas, glass form with successful lead submission, navbar transitions, animated trust bar counters, 7 why-us cards, contact links (tel/wa.me/mailto), map iframe. No horizontal overflow on mobile 390x844.
critical_code_review_comments: LeadForm: the marketplace select has HTML5 `required` attribute AND a JS toast for empty marketplace. Native browser validation blocks submit before the JS toast fires, so the client-side toast branch is effectively dead code. Consider removing `required` from the select if you want the custom toast to trigger, or remove the JS check.
server.py stores created_at as ISO string in Mongo but Lead model expects datetime — GET /api/leads converts back on read which works, but consider storing as native BSON datetime for range queries.
GET /api/leads has no auth/pagination — publicly exposes all leads. Should be protected or removed in production.
seed_data_creation: Created 1 TEST_ prefixed lead via API test (kept for GET verification).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend + frontend fully working. Note: unauthenticated GET /api/leads exposes all leads publicly — flag for main agent if this is a security concern. Client-side 'select marketplace' toast never fires because native HTML5 required kicks in first.
